title: AI chat therapist subscription
idea: A consumer subscription app ($19/month) offering 24/7 AI 'therapy-style' chat for anxiety and mild depression. Marketed as 'always available support, not a replacement for licensed care' in small footer text. Backend calls a single frontier LLM provider with a long system prompt and RAG over CBT worksheets. Crisis keywords trigger a static hotline message. No human clinicians in the loop. Launch markets: US and Indonesia.
focus_notes: Quality ceiling / harmful advice / hallucination in clinical-adjacent domain
Trust collapse after one viral failure story
